title: centaurea oltensis
intro: Centaurea oltensis, also known as Oltu thistle, is a perennial herbaceous plant that belongs to the daisy family, characterized by its thistle-like appearance and purple flowers. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, due to its high concentration of sesquiterpene lactones. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing pain and inflammation, as well as exhibiting antioxidant and antimicrobial properties. Centaurea oltensis is typically used in herbal preparations, including infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be consumed orally or applied topically to alleviate various health issues.
